submissions.synthesis_method: Generic reversible permutation synthesis: decomposed the controlled y->(2y mod 21) permutation into disjoint cycles, each cycle into transpositions, and each transposition into 2k-1 adjacent bit-flips implemented as c5x gates (with x conjugation for control-on-0).
submissions.self_check: Assembled circuit unitary matches the controlled 2y mod 21 permutation; verified unitary and shape (64,64).
